scripts.dev:local: concurrently "cd apps/web && npm run dev" "cd apps/worker && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @seo-spider/shared && npm run build --workspace @seo-spider/web && npm run build --workspace @seo-spider/worker
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @seo-spider/shared && npm run lint --workspace @seo-spider/web && npm run lint --workspace @seo-spider/worker
